# Mochi Mango Arcade

> Mochi Mango Arcade is a free HTML5 games portal and character-merch shop by Fire Dragon Interactive. 216 instant-play browser games — runners, platformers, puzzles, arcade shooters, mazes, memory and tower-stacking games — starring original mascot characters, playable on mobile and desktop with no download and no sign-up. 38 games are playable right now, with more added regularly.

## About
- 100% free to play, no install or account, runs in any modern browser.
- Family-friendly original characters across 6 universes: Puddle & Pip Cozyverse, The AstroMochi Crew, Nine Gates Mahjong Kingdom, SnackStreet Squad, Oracle Mirror Oddities, Mochi Mango Originals.
- Every game stars a recurring mascot, also sold as plushies, apparel, pins and stickers in the merch shop.
- Made by Fire Dragon Interactive (https://www.firedragoninteractive.com).

## Key pages
- [All games](https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/games/): browse and filter all 216 games.
- [Universes](https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/universes/): recurring worlds and their games.
- [Characters](https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/characters/): mascot bios.
- [Merch shop](https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/shop/): plushies and collectibles.
- [New releases](https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/new-releases/): the latest free games.

## FAQ
### Is Mochi Mango Arcade free to play?
Yes. Every game on Mochi Mango Arcade is 100% free to play — no downloads, no installs and no sign-up required.

### Do I need to download or install anything?
No. All Mochi Mango Arcade games are instant-play HTML5 games that run right in your web browser on phones, tablets and computers.

### Can I play the games on mobile?
Yes. Mochi Mango Arcade games are mobile-friendly and work on iOS, Android, tablets and desktop browsers with touch or keyboard controls.

### Are the games kid-friendly?
Yes. Mochi Mango Arcade games feature original, family-friendly mascot characters and are safe and suitable for players of all ages.

### How many games does Mochi Mango Arcade have?
Mochi Mango Arcade has 216 games across 6 original universes, with 38 playable right now and more added regularly.

### Can I buy plushies and merch of the characters?
Yes. Official Mochi Mango Arcade merch — plushies, apparel, mugs, pins and stickers featuring the mascots — is available in the on-site merch shop.

### Who makes Mochi Mango Arcade?
Mochi Mango Arcade is created by Fire Dragon Interactive, an original games and character studio.
